hero_subtitle: SFTY Business unifies KYB provider data and regulatory rules into a continuous, auditable workflow that streamlines corporate risk monitoring after onboarding.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear visibility into evolving business risks after onboarding due to scattered KYB data and unlinked provider outputs. This fragmentation makes it harder to monitor changes effectively and preserve an audit-ready evidence trail for regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links fragmented KYB provider outputs, corporate risk signals and regulatory updates into a unified ongoing monitoring workflow with audit-ready evidence for compliance teams at VASPs.
workflow_title: From ongoing KYB checks to approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects ongoing KYB provider updates through risk rules, case review, decision logging and evidence preservation for continuous compliance monitoring.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for ongoing KYB monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects ongoing KYB data, corporate risk signals and regulatory updates into structured workflows and review processes for VASPs and regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage ongoing KYB workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates ongoing KYB by aggregating provider outputs, monitoring rule triggers, routing cases for review, logging decisions and updating policies to support continuous corporate due diligence.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYB evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording provider results, decision logs, case history and regulatory rule changes, supporting traceability and explainability for ongoing KYB compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with existing KYB providers and layers their outputs into one compliance workflow without requiring replacement, preserving operational continuity and provider neutrality.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYB or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYB or KYC providers but connects their data into structured workflows, decisions and audit evidence to improve operational control and compliance scalability.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider data, regulatory rules and risk signals into an auditable corporate monitoring workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
